headline: 2 Reasons to Watch HUM and 1 to Stay Cautious
summary: Humana’s 13.2% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 5.3%, and its stock price has climbed to $272.25 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Humana, CenterWell and USAA Unite with VFW for National Day of Service Supporting Veterans Experiencing Homelessness
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky., May 14, 2026--Humana, CenterWell and USAA unite with VFW for national Day of Service supporting veterans experiencing homelessness.

headline: CVRx Announces Humana Medicare Advantage Coverage Policy for Barostim Therapy
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, May 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CVRx, Inc. (NASDAQ: CVRX) (“CVRx”), a commercial-stage medical device company focused on developing, manufacturing and commercializing innovative neuromodulation solutions for patients with cardiovascular diseases, announced today that Humana has issued a Medicare Advantage coverage policy for Barostim therapy, effective May 1, 2026.
